lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Greetings, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Exploring. Isn't it exciting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't it just! Found anything interesting?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: This sanctuary has been sealed for centuries and it's full to the brim with history of my sect... Everything is interesting!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you even know where to begin?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: I... Don't. It might explain the aimless wandering.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh, I've always wondered why so many people do that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with the mask?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: These are the masks of the Sisterhood. While symbolic, they also have practical uses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really? What like?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Herbs can be stored within the beak, masking the smell of death and preventing us from becoming infected.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds handy. Can I have one?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: You ask too many questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that a yes?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: It's a no. To wear a mask of the Sisterhood, you need to join the Sisterhood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Sisterhood?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: An ancient order, born right here in Slepe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well sign me up!

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: You lack the qualities we're currently looking for. Perhaps another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Sisterhood.

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Many years ago, the Sisterhood were a group of healers dedicated to Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: However, our leader, a justiciar known as Phosani, saw the truth in Saradomin's teachings and turned away from his false light.

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Phosani embraced the glory of Zamorak and most of our order did the same. After that, she became known as the Inquisitor, though our order refers to her as 'Mother'.

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: After the order reached enlightenment through Zamorak, we made our home in an abandoned hermitage. Over time, that hermitage grew into the town you see today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to those that refused to turn away from Saradomin?

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: They were shown the error of their ways through fire and blood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How wonderful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Sister Naoj
lines.text: Be safe, traveller.
